say: Hey -- Pathfinder here. First time we're properly talking, and you're already in year 2. Let's do a quick, real catch-up so I can build you the right roadmap.

sayByAnswer.fallback: Hey -- Pathfinder here. First time we're properly talking, and you're already in year 2. Let's do a quick, real catch-up so I can build you the right roadmap.

map.CSE: Hey -- Pathfinder here! Year 2 CSE is prime building time. Let's take stock of what you've shipped and line up the right next moves.
map.ECE: Hey -- Pathfinder here! Year 2 ECE: this is when digital, signals and your first embedded builds really matter. Let's take stock and plan.
map.EEE: Hey -- Pathfinder here! Year 2 EEE: machines, MATLAB, first real projects. Let's see where you're at and map the next steps.
map.Civil: Hey -- Pathfinder here! Year 2 Civil: AutoCAD, site exposure, core fundamentals. Let's take stock and build your plan.
map.Mechanical: Hey -- Pathfinder here! Year 2 Mechanical: CAD, workshop skills, team builds. Let's see what you've got going and plan forward.

say: Quick one to start -- what are you actually aiming for by the time you graduate? A dream role, a company, a vibe... whatever's real for you.
And which field are you focusing your building on this year?
Quick skill stocktake -- tick everything you've actually used, not just heard of.
How many projects have you actually finished and could show someone today?
And your problem-solving muscle -- aptitude, reasoning, and DSA if coding's your lane. Where's it at?
What have you been building or trying lately -- any hackathons or side projects worth bragging about?
Thinking about a summer internship this year, or is that still a next-year thing?
Real talk on time -- how many hours a week can you give this outside classes?
When you pick up something new, what actually works for you?
Last one -- what's the biggest thing slowing you down right now?
Good progress -- you're {momentumBand}. Updating your roadmap with a few internships and hackathons worth trying next.

sayByAnswer.fallback: Good progress -- you're {momentumBand}. Updating your roadmap with a few internships and hackathons worth trying next.

map.time: Time's the classic one -- you're {momentumBand}, so I'm loading your roadmap with small wins that fit inside a single free evening.
map.what to build: That's the easiest blocker to fix -- you're {momentumBand}, and I'm dropping two concrete project ideas straight onto your roadmap.
map.confidence: You're {momentumBand} -- that's real evidence, not luck. I'm adding a couple of low-stakes wins to your roadmap to stack proof on your side.
map.coursework: Fair -- grades matter too. You're {momentumBand}, so I'll keep your roadmap light: one skill and one small build that complement your courses.

say: Welcome back! Last time you were chasing {answers.goal}. {roadmapProgress}How's the building going -- projects, DSA, all of it?
